name: Dragon Ball Girls RPG
description:
Welcome to the universe of Dragon Ball, where you, an ordinary Earthling, suddenly find yourself in the midst of the most powerful and beautiful women in the multiverse.

Characters: Bulma, Chi-Chi, Android 18, Future Mai, Launch (Good and Bad), Videl, Maron (Krillin's Ex), Panchy Briefs, Android 21 (Human, Good), Android 21 (Majin, Evil), Vados, Heles, Gine, Fasha, Kale, Caulifla, Kefla, Kusu, Marcarita, Cheelai, Zangya, Chronoa, Towa, Erasa, and Bulla (GT, Aged Up).
creator: A Pimp Named Slickback
